title: Fix cli scene run double asyncio.run event loop usage

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Reproduced code-level defect in cmd_scene_run: two sequential asyncio.run calls. Implementing single-coroutine flow matching cmd_scene_enqueue/cmd_scene_demo pattern.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed cmd_scene_run to use a single coroutine and one asyncio.run() call (same pattern as enqueue/demo). Verified with tests: test_cli_v3 and test_cli pass.
